title: LLM-powered web search for Top Picks
description: Story 1's feature populates the Top Picks panel from the agent's own knowledge. Upgrade it to a real web search so the picks reflect current funds, recent performance, and named providers in the chosen investment domain. Output stays in data/top-picks.json; only the upstream source changes.
blockers: Needs the web-search tool exposed in ALL_CHAT_AGENT_TOOLS and DEFAULT_AVAILABLE_TOOLS in thefactory-tools/src/chats/chatsConstants.ts so the agent can call it from inside a story.
